summary: A fun, colorful, and interactive kids app. Specific type (learning game, storybook, drawing tool, etc.) not yet determined.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cheerful cartoon sun mascot character with a smiling face and rosy cheeks, transparent background (mascot-sun.dim_256x256.png)
- Colorful confetti banner decoration strip with stars, dots, and zigzags on a transparent background (confetti-banner.dim_800x120.png)
- Set of 8 cute animal emoji-style card face illustrations (cat, dog, frog, rabbit, bear, duck, owl, fox) arranged in a 2×4 grid, each on a rounded pastel tile (animal-cards.dim_512x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a welcoming home screen with a large animated title, colorful character mascot or illustration, and clearly labeled activity buttons that a child can independently navigate.
Implement a simple Number & Letter Learning section where kids can tap/click on letters A–Z and numbers 1–20 to hear or see their name displayed in a large, animated pop-up card.

Implement a simple Memory Match mini-game with colorful emoji or animal cards. Cards are placed face-down and a child flips two at a time to find matching pairs. Track and display the number of matches found.
Implement a simple Color & Draw canvas where kids can pick a color from a palette and draw freely with their mouse or finger (touch support), plus a 'Clear' button to reset the canvas.

Apply a consistent, joyful visual theme across the entire app: bright primary colors (reds, yellows, greens, oranges), rounded bubbly shapes, large chunky typography (e.g., a rounded sans-serif), star/confetti decorative accents, and high-contrast elements to ensure readability for young children. Navigation must be icon-first with large tap targets (minimum 48×48px).

new_feature_requests.summary: Store and retrieve each child's best Memory Match score (fewest moves) using the backend so progress persists across sessions.
